name: JACCS Co., Ltd.
summary: JACCS Co., Ltd. operates as a consumer finance company in Japan and Southeast Asia. The company provides installment credit and other settlement methods for home renovation and other housing-related fields, motorcycles, premium wristwatches and jewelry, kimono, and household appliances and electronics, as well as credit for education, bridal, and healthcare services; auto leasing services; and auto loans for vehicle purchases. It also issues credit cards; offers credit guarantees for personal and housing loans; and provides rent guarantees and bill collection, insurance and warranties, leasing, payment settlement, and factoring services. The company was formerly known as Depart Sinyohanbai Co., Ltd. and changed its name to JACCS Co., Ltd. in April 1976. JACCS Co., Ltd. was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
